---
title: ""
format:
  revealjs:
    chalkboard: true
---

## NRS 520 {.smaller .scrollable}
```{=html}
<style type="text/css">

body, td {
   font-size: 14px;
}
</style>

```

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Start 
<p><a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Schedule/Schedule.html">Schedule/Syllabus</a></p>

Install the most reversions of <a href="https://cran.r-project.org/">R</a> and <a href="https://www.rstudio.com/products/rstudio/download/">RStudio</a>.

<a href="https://celsrs.uri.edu/">CELS RStudio Server</a>

### Week 1 

-   Lecture: <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 1/Introduction.html">1) Introduction</a>, <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 1/Information.html"> 2) Information</a>

-   Download: <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 1/Markdown and R Stuff.Rmd">1) Markdown Example File</a>, <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 1/Markdown-and-R-Stuff.html">2) Compiled HTML</a>

-   <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 1/Assignment.html">Assignment</a>

-    <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 1/getting started with statistics.pdf">Assigned Reading</a>

### Week 2
-   Install R packages:
```{r, eval=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
install.packages(c("ggplot2", "spsurvey", "foreach",
                   "sf", "doParallel", "grDevices","tictoc"))
```

-   Lecture: <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 2/StudyDesign.html">Study Design</a>

-   Download: <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 2/RI Deer Sampling.zip">Zip</a>

-   <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 2/Assignment.design.html">Assignment</a>

-   <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 2/Betts et al.pdf">Assigned Reading</a>

### Week 3

-   Lecture: <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 3/Probability.html">Probabilty</a>

-   Download: <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 3/Assignment.pdf.Rmd">.Rmd</a>

-   <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 3/Assignment.pdf.html">Assignment</a>

-   <a href="https://medium.com/@srowen/common-probability-distributions-347e6b945ce4">Assigned Reading</a>

-   <a href="https://bgerber123.github.io/Week 3/SuggestedReadings.zip">Suggested Readings</a>

### Week 4

-   Lecture: <a href="">Probabilty</a>

-   Download: <a href="">.Rmd</a>

-   <a href="">Assignment</a>

-   <a href="Chapter 2. From Research Hypothesis to Model Selection.pdf">Assigned Reading</a>

-   <a href="Chapter 3. Linear Regression.pdf">Suggested Readings</a>


:::
